items.caption: A screenshot of a text message conversation on a smartphone. the conversation includes a message from a contact labeled "dad" and a response from an unknown sender. the text from "dad" reads, "it is 10 pm where are you?" followed by a message from the unknown sender that says, "i am in a dark alley with my drug dealer trying to get a good deal on his new batch of weed." the response from "dad" is, "as long as i know where you are." the time stamp indicates the conversation took place on december 28, 2011, at 10:01 pm. the background of the image is a typical smartphone interface with a status bar at the top showing the time as 10:41 pm and the battery level at 100%. the overall style of the image is casual and informal, suggesting a personal and private communication.
